assignments.name: synergyReport
assignments.value:
🤝 *Cross-Brand Synergy Report*

*Brand Combination:* {{ $json.brand_combination.brands[0].toUpperCase() }} ↔ {{ $json.brand_combination.brands[1].toUpperCase() }}

*Synergy Score:* {{ $json.synergy_score.overall_score.toFixed(1) }}% ({{ $json.synergy_score.priority.toUpperCase() }} Priority)

*Score Breakdown:*
• Audience Overlap: {{ $json.synergy_score.individual_scores.audience_overlap.toFixed(0) }}%
• Platform Overlap: {{ $json.synergy_score.individual_scores.platform_overlap.toFixed(0) }}%
• Theme Compatibility: {{ $json.synergy_score.individual_scores.theme_compatibility.toFixed(0) }}%
• Revenue Synergy: {{ $json.synergy_score.individual_scores.revenue_synergy.toFixed(0) }}%

*Growth Potential:*
• Audience Growth: +{{ $json.synergy_metrics.audience_growth_potential }}%
• Revenue Increase: +{{ $json.synergy_metrics.revenue_increase_potential }}%
• Content Efficiency: +{{ $json.synergy_metrics.content_efficiency_gain }}%

*Immediate Actions ({{ $json.recommendations.implementation_roadmap.immediate_actions.length }}):*
{{ $json.recommendations.implementation_roadmap.immediate_actions.map((action, i) => `${i+1}. ${action.recommendation.substring(0, 60)}...`).join('
') }}

*Next Review:* {{ new Date($json.next_review_date).toLocaleDateString() }}
